overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting exploration of a post-apocalyptic desert wasteland. The player character exits a collapsed structure, traverses an open area toward a large circular building labeled 'ANATOMICON', passes NPCs working on abandoned vehicles, and enters a dark doorway. The environment features warm desert lighting, scattered palm trees, and makeshift settlements.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed building interior transitioning to exterior

events.description: exits the collapsed concrete structure into bright outdoor wasteland

agents.ego_description: navigating through concrete debris and structural beams to exit the ruined building

entered.detail: large piles of broken concrete and rebar blocking the path
painted steel support beam leaning against the structure
closed metal roll-up door with weathered surface
scattered rubble and trash covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a collapsed concrete structure with debris scattered everywhere. The player moves forward through the rubble, passing a blue structural beam and white garage door, then emerges into bright sunlight revealing palm trees and distant rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland with abandoned structures

events.description: descends a slight slope toward the main ANATOMICON building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open wasteland toward the large circular building in the distance

entered.detail: large circular orange and black building with prominent ANATOMICON signage
tall palm trees scattered across the desert landscape
rusted orange metal barriers and fencing
dark smoke rising from buildings in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The player traverses an open desert wasteland with sparse vegetation and abandoned vehicles. The large ANATOMICON building dominates the center of view, growing larger as the player approaches. Orange construction barriers line the left side while dark smoke rises in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle repair area in front of ANATOMICON

events.description: approaches group of NPCs working on abandoned vehicles near the building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of survivors gathered around vehicle wrecks near the ANATOMICON entrance

notable_agents.action: wearing red headwear and shorts, standing beside a blue van with open rear doors
crouching down examining vehicle parts on the ground

entered.detail: rusted blue van with both rear doors open, appearing to be scavenged
burned-out sedan with missing doors and windows
red and white striped concrete barricades blocking off areas

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the front of the ANATOMICON building where several NPCs are gathered around abandoned vehicles. A person in red headwear stands by a blue van while another crouches near car parts. The building's orange facade and large signage become prominent as the player moves closer to the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: side path along the ANATOMICON building perimeter

events.description: turns left to follow the path alongside the building wall

agents.ego_description: passing the vehicle repair area and continuing along the side of the ANATOMICON building

notable_agents.action: two individuals walking toward the camera along the dirt path

entered.detail: white and orange striped metal barricades lining the path
corpse lying face-down in the dirt near the building entrance
damaged multi-level building with exposed interiors

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the NPCs and follows a path along the side of the ANATOMICON building. Construction barriers line the left side while the building wall dominates the right. Two individuals walk toward the camera from the opposite direction, and a dead body lies on the ground near the approach to a side entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entrance corridor to ANATOMICON interior

events.description: enters the shadow of the building overhang, light drops significantly
passes through the dark doorway into the building interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark entrance and stepping into the shadowy interior of the ANATOMICON building

entered.detail: dark doorway with ANATOMICON signage above and blood splatters on the frame
blue and white plastic barrels stacked near the entrance
shadowy tunnel leading into the building interior with debris on the floor
dark red stains on the concrete ground and walls near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a dark side entrance to the ANATOMICON building, passing a dead body and industrial barrels. The lighting shifts dramatically as the player enters the shadow of the overhang, revealing blood splatters around the doorway. The segment ends as the player steps into the dark corridor leading to the building's interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the ruins of a collapsed concrete structure into the oppressive shadows of a mysterious industrial facility. It begins amidst scattered rubble and blue structural beams, moving through a white garage door to emerge into the bright sunlight of a desert wasteland dotted with palm trees and distant rock formations. As the camera traverses the open terrain past orange construction barriers and rising smoke, the massive ANATOMICON building grows in scale until the player reaches a gathering of NPCs working around abandoned vehicles. The scene then shifts along the building's orange facade, passing two oncoming pedestrians and a corpse on the ground before turning toward a side entrance. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically from golden desert hues to deep shadow as the camera passes industrial barrels and blood splatters to enter a dark interior corridor.
